highlights:
Healthcare Payers Lag in AI Value Realization | Everest Group posted on the topic | LinkedIn
...
# Healthcare Payers Lag in AI Value Realization
...
https://www.linkedin.com/company/everest-group
...
Everest Group
...
Artificial Intelligence (AI) adoption is no longer the finish line for healthcare payer operations. Our latest research from 50+ payers shows gen AI adoption is gaining momentum, but value realization still lags. Intelligent operations, AI-enabled, data-driven, domain-led models linking workflows, tech, talent, and judgment, drive measurable outcomes, not isolated productivity gains. Key insights from the report explore: ➡️ AI adoption is rising, but measurable impact is limited: 70% deployed gen AI in one function at a limited scale; 84% report only limited measurable improvement ➡️ Human oversight is essential in high-risk clinical, financial, and compliance areas: over half cite domain expertise, change, and decision-making as the top workforce capability Read the report: https://okt.to/TJ0DcG Get in touch: Ankur Verma Vivek Kumar Vidharsana S#HealthcarePayers#PayerOperations#HealthcareAI#GenerativeAI
...

results.title: Machine Learning Scientist III job with Expedia Group | 1417143
highlights:
Machine Learning Scientist III job with Expedia Group | 1417143
...
# Machine Learning Scientist III
...
Employer Expedia Group Location Bangalore, India Salary Competitive Closing date 30 Jul 2026
...
Sector Data Science, Science and Pharmaceutical Role Professional Contract Type Permanent Hours Full Time
...
## Job Details
...
At Expedia Group, we help travelers explore the world, one journey at a time. As a global travel company powered by passionate people, trusted partnerships, and leading technology, we connect travelers, partners, and advertisers through our consumer brands, B2B network, and travel advertising business.Here, you'll do meaningful work that helps millions of people discover, book, and experience travel with more ease, confidence, and joy. Our five Behaviors-Traveler First, Think Big, Operate with Excellence, Ownership Mindset, and Succeed Together-help foster a supportive environment where people can grow their careers and have the flexibility, benefits, and support to do their best work. Join us and build for travelers everywhere.Introduction to teamWe create and deliver tailored marketing strategies for Expedia Group`s brands, focusing on establishing strong connections and cohesive experiences for travelers and partners. We leverage our functional expertise and creative excellence to build trust and loyalty for our brands through innovative marketing approaches and technology.Are you passionate about using Machine Learning (ML) and Natural Language Processing techniques to enhance the Traveler Experience? Our Marketing Content Machine Learning Science team focuses on generating and optimizing content that delivers relevant, personalized experiences to travelers and drives value for our business.If you're ready for your next challenge and want to innovate in a forward-thinking and cutting-edge team, we want to speak with you!We are looking for a self-motivated and independent individual who will have end to end ownership over driving impact to Expedia`s largest Marketing channels. With ample access to the latest technology this could be an exciting position for someone who loves to explore and deeply understand applications of machine learning!In this role, you will:
...
- Develop and implement advanced machine learning models (including Large Language Models) and statistical algorithms, processing massive datasets to build scalable prototypes.
- Explore new content opportunities in text and image domains to create personalized traveler experiences with high business impact.
- Design and run experiments (A/B testing, multi-variate, factorial design, stratified sampling) to measure the effectiveness of campaigns and new initiatives.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including Machine Learning Science, Marketing, and Engineering, and present findings to executives and stakeholders to drive strategic decisions.
- Contribute to the success of Expedia's ML community by mentoring team members, fostering a collaborative culture, and sharing best practices with other ML teams.
...
Experience and Qualifications:
...
- Master`s Degree or PhD preferred in a related field, or equivalent related professional experience
- Proficient in one or more data science programming languages (Python, Java, R).
- Proven experience applying NLP techniques and LLMs in production to solve business problems and generate significant value.
- Strong expertise in ML techniques such as Bayesian Methods, Clustering, Decision Trees, Latent Dirichlet Allocation, NER, Random Forests, and more.
- Accustomed to collaborative, fun work environments.

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including
...
machine learning,
...
, and mathematical
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s Degree
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.

You will be responsible for designing and implementing AI-enabled solutions that are secure, resilient, compliant, and aligned with enterprise architecture standards. This role requires strong experience in translating business requirements into end-to-end AI solution architectures, including platform integration, governance, observability, and production readiness. The ideal candidate will work across business, engineering, security, data, and risk teams to deliver scalable and responsible AI solutions for enterprise use cases.

AI environments.

results.title: Data Scientist (AI Data & LLM Specialist) | Wfh
highlights:
Data Scientist (AI Data & LLM Specialist) | Wfh
...
# Data Scientist (AI Data & LLM Specialist)
...
Join the core team at Eclipse, where we’re building an AI agent-first marketplace that connects intelligence with real-world tasks, starting with data collection and labeling. We are seeking a Data Scientist to establish the foundation for how our data is labeled, processed, and prepared for consumption by next-generation Large Language Models (LLMs). Your work will be critical in transforming our raw data collections into valuable, AI-ready datasets.
...
- Proven experience as a Data Scientist or Machine Learning Engineer with a focus on data quality and preparation.
- Strong understanding of data labeling methodologies and hands-on experience with data annotation platforms and workflows.
...
- Demonstrated experience preparing datasets for training and fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs), including knowledge of techniques like tokenization, embeddings, and NER.
...
- Proficiency in Python and common data science libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, spaCy, Hugging Face).
...
- Experience using APIs/SDKs to automate data annotation and active learning loops.
...
- Responsibilities
...
- Develop Data Labeling Strategies: Design and document a formal data annotation strategy, including clear, scalable, and efficient guidelines for labeling our data. Define and enforce quality metrics, including inter-annotator agreement.
...
- Optimize for LLM Consumption: Research, define, and prototype the optimal data formats, structures, and pre-processing steps required for fine-tuning and training LLMs on our datasets.
...
- Data Quality Analysis: Establish automated processes and metrics to analyze the quality of both raw and labeled data, providing feedback to improve our data collection and labeling workflows.
...
- Collaborate with Engineering: Work closely with the engineering team to guide the implementation of data processing pipelines and ensure the data infrastructure meets the needs of ML applications.
...
- Nice-to-Haves
- Experience with audio data processing and relevant libraries.
- Familiarity with data annotation platforms and tools.
- Knowledge of modern MLOps principles and practices.
- Experience with large language model data curation and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipelines.

results.title: [Remote] Machine Learning Scientist III | Remotepulse
highlights:
[Remote] Machine Learning Scientist III | Remotepulse
...
# [Remote] Machine Learning Scientist III
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Expedia Group is a leader in travel technology, and they are seeking a Machine Learning Scientist III to join their Traveler Engagement & Loyalty team. The role focuses on building and optimizing machine learning models for customer relationship management, directly influencing traveler experiences through personalized recommendations and engagement strategies. Responsibilities • Build and optimize recommendation models for CRM use cases, including personalized email campaigns and retention strategies • Apply deep learning and causal inference to sparse, noisy, and dynamic customer interaction data • Design and analyze A/B experiments to validate model performance and drive product decisions • Collaborate with ML Engineers to deploy models at scale, ensuring robustness and reliability in production environments • Translate business objectives into measurable machine learning goals aligned with customer engagement outcomes • Stay current with advancements in recommendation research, deep learning architectures, and personalization systems Skills • MS, or BS in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, Engineering, or a related field; or equivalent professional experience • 3+ years of experience building production-grade recommendation or personalization systems • Strong understanding of collaborative filtering, deep learning for recommendations, reinforcement learning, and causal inference • Proficiency in Python and ML frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch • Experience with distributed systems like Apache Spark • Familiarity with A/B testing and experimentation methodologies • Ability to work with large-scale, real-world data with attention to bias, fairness, and privacy • Excellent communication skills for both technical and non-technical audiences • PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, Engineering, or a related field • Experience in the travel or e-commerce industry • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) • Publications in top-tier ML conferences or journals • Contributions to open-source ML projects • Experience in personalization systems or CRM-focused ML applications • Experience taking models from prototype to production in collaboration with Machine Learning Engineering teams Company Overview • At Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE), we believe travel is a force for good – it opens minds, builds connections, and bridges divides. It was founded in 1996, and is headquartered in Seattle, Washington, USA, with a workforce of 10001+ employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Expedia Group has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 519 in 2025, 410 in 2024, 382 in 2023, 629 in 2022, 483 in 2021, 366 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.
